commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.review_summary:
This PR removes PR egg hatch command routing, generated image publishing, separate hatch comment sync/rendering, and related tests/workflow paths while leaving normal PR status labels in place.

Reproducibility: yes. from source inspection: a ClawSweeper bot comment containing `clawsweeper-pr-egg-hatch` is filtered on current main, but the PR head removes that marker from `isClawSweeperNoiseComment`. A focused regression test can exercise `filterReviewContextCommentsForTest` with such a legacy comment.
commands.review_followup: A maintainer should decide whether the hatch feature removal is acceptable; the narrow code blocker is to preserve legacy hatch-comment filtering before merge.

target.title: refactor(review): remove PR egg hatching
target.body:
## Summary

Remove the PR egg hatching feature from ClawSweeper.

This removes the hatch repository dispatch path, hatch command classification/dispatch, separate PR egg comment sync, generated PR egg image publishing, and the PR egg rendering/generation helpers. The normal PR status label flow remains intact.

## Background

The feature originated in the PR egg chain:

- https://github.com/openclaw/clawsweeper/pull/120
- https://github.com/openclaw/clawsweeper/pull/121
- https://github.com/openclaw/clawsweeper/pull/122
- https://github.com/openclaw/clawsweeper/pull/134

This is a surgical removal rather than a raw revert because the original introduction also included unrelated security hardening that should stay.

## Impact

Users can no longer trigger `@clawsweeper hatch`, and ClawSweeper will no longer generate or publish PR egg image assets or marker-backed PR egg comments. Review, re-review, label sync, repair, and publish paths continue without the egg-specific side channel.

## Validation

- `pnpm run build:all`
- `pnpm run lint`
- `pnpm run test:unit`
- `pnpm run test:repair`
- `git diff --check`
- `rg -n "prEgg|PrEgg|PR_EGG|pr_egg|pr-eggs|PR egg|pr egg|egg|hatch|Hatch|clawsweeper-pr-egg|clawsweeper_hatch|hatch_pr_egg" test src dashboard scripts .github/workflows/sweep.yml` returned no matches

`pnpm run check` currently reaches `format:check` and fails on repo-wide formatter drift in untouched files; verified with untouched examples including `src/codex-env.ts`, `src/command.ts`, and `test/pr-surface-stats.test.ts`.
target.author: vincentkoc
